name: James Barber's Pan Roasted Salmon W/Sweet Pep
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red or Yellow Peppers (or combination), coarsely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large frying pan and sauté the peppers and garlic over high heat for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
2. Add the vinegar and cook for another minute, still stirring.
3. Push the peppers to one side of the pan and place the salmon on top. Cook for 30 seconds, then turn the salmon over.
4. Add the wine. Sprinkle with thyme, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper.
5. Spoon the peppers over the salmon. Put the lid on the frying pan and cook over medium heat for 6 minutes or until the salmon flakes when fork-tested.
6. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
